item.title: Thought it was an invitation

media:content.media:title: Thought it was an invitation

item.title: a little piggy for your feed
item.description: This unexpected little guest steals the spotlight.

item.title: he had no business winning like this
item.description: Nobody expected that response and the room showed it.

media:content.media:title: he had no business winning like this
media:content.media:description: Nobody expected that response and the room showed it.

item.title: you guys have any pets?
item.description: A simple question about pets led to an unforgettable conversation.

media:content.media:title: you guys have any pets?
media:content.media:description: A simple question about pets led to an unforgettable conversation.

item.title: wait till you hear what he said
item.description: Everyone had something to say and they did not hold back.

item.title: the neck crawl is crazy
item.description: That reaction had everyone laughing from the start.

item.title: she likes a man with an accent
item.description: Sometimes an accent is all it takes to make an impression.

media:content.media:description: Sometimes an accent is all it takes to make an impression.

item.title: they did not let that slide
item.description: The first reaction was priceless and things only got more chaotic.

item.title: it's a condition... apparently
item.description: The more they tried to explain it the funnier it became.

media:content.media:title: it's a condition... apparently
media:content.media:description: The more they tried to explain it the funnier it became.

item.title: bro has no filter
item.description: Sometimes the funniest moments come from the people who say exactly what's on their mind.

media:content.media:title: bro has no filter
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the funniest moments come from the people who say exactly what's on their mind.

item.title: Would you?
item.description: A single question can make the toughest decision surprisingly difficult.

item.description: This blindfolded twist takes the balloon challenge to another level.

item.description: Nobody was ready for that response and the silence said it all.

item.description: That opinion ended the conversation before anyone could respond.

item.description: Now the real question is whether yours is still up.

item.description: A simple question can reveal more than you expect.

item.description: One answer changed the entire vibe in an instant.

item.title: we would never even if you asked
item.description: Sometimes the delivery makes the moment even funnier than the words themselves.
